detaileddescription.para: This function looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID.
The table XPmonPsv_ConfigTable contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the ID of the device for which the device configuration pointer is to be returned.

listitem.para: A pointer to the configuration found.
NULL if the specified device ID was not found.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a specific XPmonPsv device/instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the Performance Monitor device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.
points to the XPmonPsv device configuration structure.

is the device base address in the virtual memory address space. If the address translation is not used then the physical address is passed. Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping is changed after this function is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device is already started.

simplesect.para: The user needs to first call the XPmonPsv_LookupConfig() API which returns the Configuration structure pointer which is passed as a parameter to the XPmonPsv_CfgInitialize() API.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the specified counter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.
is one of the counter like lpd_main or r5_domain eg XPMONPSV_R5_DOMAIN, XPMONPSV_LPD_MAIN_DOMAIN
is the Counter Number. The valid values are 0 to 9.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const XPmonPsv *InstancePtr, u32 StatPeriod, u32 Domain, u32 CounterNum)
memberdef.name: XPmonPsv_SetMetrics

briefdescription.para: This function sets Metrics for specified Counter in the corresponding Metric Selector Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.
is the period for which specified counter has to be connected.
is one of the counter like lpd_main or r5_domain
is the Counter Number. The valid values are 0 to 9.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const XPmonPsv *InstancePtr, u32 CounterNum, u8 *MainCtl, u8 *StatPeriod, u32 Domain)
memberdef.name: XPmonPsv_GetMetrics

briefdescription.para: This function returns Metrics in the specified Counter from the corresponding Metric Selector Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.
is the Counter Number. The valid values are 0 to 9.
is a reference parameter from application where mainctrl of specified counter is filled.
is the reference parameter from application where the StatPeriod is filled.
is one of the counter like lpd_main or r5_domain

briefdescription.para: This function returns success if a free counter was found and request was granted.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance. which the value of Write Request Count has to be filled
is one of the counter like lpd_main or r5_domain
pointer to get Counter Number.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XPmonPsv *InstancePtr, u32 *WriteRequestValue, u32 *WriteRespValue, u32 Domain, u32 CounterNum)
memberdef.name: XPmonPsv_GetWriteCounter

briefdescription.para: This function returns the contents of the Write response and request Counter Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.

is the user space pointer with
which the value of Write Request Count has to be filled

is the user space pointer with
which the value of Write Response Count has to be filled
is one of the counter like lpd_main or r5_domain
is the Counter Number. The valid values are 0 to 9.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const XPmonPsv *InstancePtr, u32 *ReadRequestValue, u32 *ReadRespValue, u32 Domain, u32 CounterNum)
memberdef.name: XPmonPsv_GetReadCounter

briefdescription.para: This function returns the contents of the Read response and request Counter Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.
is the user space pointer with which the value of Write Request Count has to be filled
is the user space pointer with which the value of Write Response Count has to be filled
is one of the counter like lpd_main or r5_domain
is the Counter Number. The valid values are 0 to 9.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure

briefdescription.para: This function enables the following in the Performance Monitor:

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance. SampleInterval is the sample interval for the sampled metric counters
is one of the counter like lpd_main or r5_domain
is the Counter Number to be enabled.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure

inbodydescription.para: Setting register field GlobalEn to 1 enables the tracing and statistics collection subsystems of the packet probe.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the following in the Performance Monitor:

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.
is one of the counter like lpd_main or r5_domain
is the Counter Number. The valid values are 0 to 9.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const XPmonPsv *InstancePtr, u32 PortSel, u32 Domain, u32 CounterNum)
memberdef.name: XPmonPsv_SetPort

briefdescription.para: This function selects the Port to be monitored.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.
is the value of the portselect. eg:for lpd_main 0: lpd_fpd_axi 1: prot_xppu for r5_domain 0 : lpd_afifs_axi 1 : lpd_ocm 2 : lpd_ocmext 3 : lpd_pmc_rpu_axi0
is one of the counter like lpd_main or r5_domain
is the Counter Number. The valid values are 0 to 9.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const XPmonPsv *InstancePtr, u32 SrcSel, u32 Domain, u32 CounterNum)
memberdef.name: XPmonPsv_SetSrc

briefdescription.para: This function selects the Source to be monitored.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.
is the value of the sourceselect.
is one of the counter like lpd_main or r5_domain
is the Counter Number. The valid values are 0 to 9.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success XST_FAILURE on failure

inbodydescription.para: Set the source 000 - OFF Counter disabled. 001 - CYCLE8 Probe clock cycles. 002 - IDLE Idle cycles during which no packet data is observed. 003 - XFER Transfer cycles during which packet data is transferred. 004 - BUSY Busy cycles during which the packet data is made available by the transmitting agent but the receiving agent is not ready to receive it. 005 - WAIT Wait cycles during a packet in which the transmitting agent suspends the transfer of packet data. 006 - PKT Packets. 007 - LUT1 Packets selected by the LUT. 008 - BYTE2 Total number of payload bytes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.
is a pointer to the XPmonPsv instance.
